---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.18.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

```{python}
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
```

```{python}
data_dir ='mc_data'
```

```{python}
name = '16x16_b0460'
```

```{python}
em = np.loadtxt(f"{data_dir}/em_{name}.txt")
```

```{python}
em.shape
```

```{python}
plt.hist(em[:,1], bins=100);
```

```{python}
from neumc.utils.stats_utils import ac_and_tau_int
```

```{python}
d=10
tau, ac = ac_and_tau_int(em[::d,1], maxlen=5000)
print(tau*d)
```

```{python}
plt.scatter(np.arange(len(ac)), ac,s=1); 
```

```{python}
bc = np.log(1+np.sqrt(2))/2
```

```{python}
betas = [0.1,0.2,0.3,0.4, 0.41, 0.42, 0.43,0.44, 0.4406, 0.440687]
taus= [0.83, 1.73, 5.5,73,117, 192, 403,690,725,768]
```

```{python}
plt.scatter(betas, taus);
plt.axvline(bc);
plt.xlabel('$\\beta$', fontsize=16);
plt.tight_layout()
plt.ylabel('$\\tau_{int}$', fontsize=16, rotation=True, labelpad=16);
plt.savefig('tau.pdf', bbox_inches='tight', pad_inches=0);
```

```{python}
bt = np.stack((betas,taus), axis=1)
```

```{python}
plt.scatter(bt[:,0],1/(2*bt[:,1]));
plt.axvline(bc);
plt.xlabel('$\\beta$', fontsize=16);
plt.tight_layout()
plt.ylabel('$ESS$', fontsize=16, rotation=True, labelpad=16);
plt.grid();
plt.savefig('ess.pdf', bbox_inches='tight', pad_inches=0);
```

```{python}
bt.shape
```

```{python}

```
